scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/server && npm run test:unit -w apps/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run type-check -w apps/client
